message:
feat(bench): add IPC throughput benchmark and expand native events suite

Add new benchmarks and fix resource cleanup in native event tests:

- ipc_throughput.rs (NEW): Criterion benchmark measuring IPC message
  serialization, deserialization, and roundtrip throughput for the
  internal command protocol
- native_events_latency.rs: Add two new benchmark scenarios —
  bench_native_parse_dispatch_latency (parse+dispatch with immediate
  consume) and bench_native_backpressure_impact (throughput under
  bounded-channel backpressure); extract common constants for timeouts
  and batch sizes
- native_events.rs: Add explicit drop(stream) calls before shutdown
  in 5 tests to prevent race conditions where the listener task holds
  a stale connection during cleanup; fix unused import (task vs
  task::JoinSet); update runtime_compat imports
- Cargo.toml: Register ipc_throughput benchmark target

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -275,6 +275,10 @@ name = "native_events_latency"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["native-wezterm"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "ipc_throughput"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "fork_hardening"
 harness = false
